items.name_en: Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
items.name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
HERMES Evelyne 16 MIlk Silver Clasp
Taurillon Maurice Calfskin Shoulder Crossbody Mini Unisex Couple Style
Exclusive channel goods, exclusive ZP factory material assembled goods, the ceiling of H.
Size: 16*18*5cm
Hermès Evelyne
The design inspiration for the Evelyne bag comes from a type of saddlebag called a 'saddle bag,' which is commonly used by riders and coachmen to store and transport harnesses and other necessities.
Hermès combines the classic elements of this saddlebag with the brand's craftsmanship tradition to create a bag that is both stylish and functional.
Therefore, the Evelyne bag is not only a practical handbag but also represents the brand's deep history and cultural traditions.
It conveys Hermès' love and respect for equestrian sports, as well as its pursuit of high quality, refinement, and elegance.

items.name_cn:
[Original Leather] Bulk Stock 🔥GG Marmont Medium
[Top-tier Original] 🔥With Packaging. Xiao Gu's signature model, the store's treasure.
We invested heavily to acquire 7 authentic pieces for continuous research and development, and the results are impressive. Our main best-seller!
As Gucci's hottest item, it is often out of stock at the counter.
Original cowhide paired with the classic double-G buckle, featuring a vintage distressed style.
It has won the hearts of countless girls and become a classic king.
If you don't know what bag to buy, this is the one!
Model 443497
Size 26x15x7cm

items.name_cn:
Original leather 👜 with packaging#
🔥Marmont quilted original leather#
Brand new Tote bag, the entire body is made of original cowhide❗️A lock design at the opening adds a sense of security, and the original leather texture is amazing. The 3D quilted stitching brings the bag to life under the light. It is easy to style and suits all heights. A versatile essential for everyone!
▫️Model 681483
▫️Dimensions 26.5*19*11cm

items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】Bulk Stock🔥 Model 575163GG
🔥 The new V-shaped quilting design of the Marmont series is now available. The front features classic double G hardware, while the back has a heart-shaped motif in antique gold. Chain shoulder strap and drawstring closure create versatile looks, also works as a crossbody. Dimensions: 19/17cm
